author: y4rr
content:
Plan: Sprint C.7 — MPS kernel layer scaffold + 10 kernels (#626).

Scope:
1. Add objc2-metal dep to ferrotorch-mps/Cargo.toml (target_os=macos gating) — already in Cargo.lock transitively
2. Create ferrotorch-mps/src/kernels/ directory with 10 .metal source strings
3. Create ferrotorch-mps/src/backend.rs — MtlBackend struct implementing GpuBackend trait
4. Extend ferrotorch-mps/src/lib.rs to re-export MtlBackend and kernel entry points
5. Extend tests/conformance_mps.rs — 10 new cascade_skip tests (no Apple Silicon on this box)
6. Update _surface_inventory.toml and _surface_exclusions.toml for new public items
7. cargo build --workspace must pass (cross-platform compile verification)
8. clippy --workspace --all-targets must be clean
9. File ~70 follow-up crosslink issues for remaining GpuBackend methods not covered

Design decisions to document:
- metal-rs vs objc2-metal: objc2-metal is already in Cargo.lock (transitive); use it
- MSL kernel shape: embed as include_str! const strings; compiled at runtime by MtlBackend::compile_kernel
- GpuBackend impl: platform-gated via #[cfg(target_os='macos')]; all methods return Err(DeviceUnavailable) on non-Apple
- No silent CPU fallback (§3 rule): every method returns Err(FerrotorchError::DeviceUnavailable) on non-Apple, Err(FerrotorchError::InvalidArgument) on Metal compile failure
